name: Jellyfin Helper
description: Cleans up orphaned .trickplay folders, media folders without video files, and provides media library statistics with audio codec analysis, export, caching, and historical trends.
overview: Cleans up orphaned .trickplay folders, empty media folders, and shows library statistics with export and trend tracking.

versions.changelog: Added audio codec analysis (AAC, FLAC, MP3, Opus, DTS, AC3, TrueHD, etc.), JSON/CSV export, historical trend graph, 5-minute IMemoryCache caching, rate limiting, input validation, path traversal protection, and shared utility refactoring (LibraryPathResolver, FileSystemHelper).
Breaking changes: Renamed to Jellyfin Helper. Added media library statistics page. Trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, dry-run modes.
Initial version with trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, and dry-run modes for both.
